description_long: This is a set of three nested wooden stools, each with a rectangular top and elegantly curved legs. The tops feature a decorative inlaid border with a floral motif, adding a touch of sophistication and traditional craftsmanship. The stools are designed to fit partially under one another, maximizing space efficiency while maintaining visual appeal. The wood has a rich, reddish-brown finish, and the inlay is lighter with intricate patterns. The legs are slender and slightly tapered, contributing to a refined silhouette. These stools are suitable for use in public or communal urban spaces, such as parks, lobbies, or waiting areas.
description: A set of three nested wooden stools with decorative inlaid tops and curved legs, finished in a rich reddish-brown with floral border motifs.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing all three stools, highlighting the decorative inlay and the nesting arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the depth and layering of the nested stools, with the smallest stool partially pulled out.
description_view_2: Opposite angled view showing the tops and the arrangement of the legs, with the smallest stool more visible.
description_view_3: Direct front view focusing on the largest stool's top and the alignment of the nested stools behind it.
